changes.summary: Free Agents page now uses the site's editorial design language: table headers match the clean gray-50 style used throughout, section labels have the signature left-border accent, filter panel labels are consistently styled, and the Clear Filters button no longer looks like it's about to revoke your fantasy license

Free Agents hero section redesigned with a broadcast-style diagonal photo cut inspired by ESPN and FOX Sports graphics — rotating NFL player photos now fill a parallelogram with accent stripes along both edges instead of sitting in a small card
